basic_details.job_title: Army Law College Pune Principal Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Army Law College Pune (ALC Pune) Principal Notification 2026 has been released on the official website www.alcpune.com. A total of 1 Principal vacancy has been announced through the ALC Pune Principal Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: PhD in Law, Master’s Degree in Law (LLM) with at least 55% marks, Professor/Associate Professor with minimum 15 years of Teaching/Research/Administrative experience, Minimum of 10 research publications in peer reviewed or UGC listed journal and a minimum of 110 Research score
qualification.details: PhD in Law. Master’s Degree in Law (LLM) with at least 55% marks. Professor/Associate Professor with a minimum of 15 years of Teaching/Research/Administrative experience. A minimum of 10 research publications in peer-reviewed or UGC listed journals. A minimum of 110 Research score. Minimum Qualification/Eligibility Criteria for the appointment of Principal as prescribed by UGC, Savitribai Phule Pune University, and Bar Council of India shall apply.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Army Law College Pune Principal Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.alcpune.com.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 20-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Army Law College Pune Principal Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the Army Law College Pune Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download Army Law College Pune Principal Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Army Law College Pune Principal Recruitment 2026 - Vacancy Details
Army Law College Pune Principal Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: PhD in Law. Master’s Degree in Law (LLM) with at least 55% marks. Professor/Associate Professor with a minimum of 15 years of Teaching/Research/Administrative experience. A minimum of 10 research publications in peer-reviewed or UGC listed journals. A minimum of 110 Research score. Minimum Qualification/Eligibility Criteria for the appointment of Principal as prescribed by UGC, Savitribai Phule Pune University, and Bar Council of India shall apply.

content_sections.heading: Army Law College Pune Principal Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for Army Law College Pune Principal Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: www.alcpune.com. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 20-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Army Law College Pune Principal Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Principal post at Army Law College Pune?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application for the Principal post at Army Law College Pune is 20th July 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well in advance of the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the minimum qualifications required for the Principal position?
faq.answer: The minimum qualifications include a PhD in Law, a Master’s Degree in Law (LLM) with at least 55% marks, and a minimum of 15 years of teaching, research, or administrative experience. Additionally, candidates must have at least 10 research publications and a research score of 110.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive, as per the information available.

faq.question: Q4. How can I apply for the Principal post?
faq.answer: The application process is offline. You need to download the application form from the official website, fill it carefully, attach necessary documents, and send it to the address mentioned in the notification before the last date.

faq.question: Q5. What is the official website of Army Law College Pune?
faq.answer: The official website of Army Law College Pune is www.alcpune.com. You can visit this website to download the application form and find more details.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the Principal post?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Principal post will primarily involve an interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their qualifications and experience for the interview round.

faq.question: Q7. Are there any age relaxations mentioned for the Principal post?
faq.answer: The official notification does not explicitly mention any specific age limits or relaxations for the Principal post. Candidates are advised to refer to the detailed notification for any such information.

faq.question: Q8. How many vacancies are available for the Principal post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the post of Principal at Army Law College Pune through this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q9. What kind of experience is required for the Principal position?
faq.answer: Candidates need to have a minimum of 15 years of teaching, research, or administrative experience. This experience is crucial for meeting the eligibility criteria for the Principal role.

faq.question: Q10. Where should I send the completed application form?
faq.answer: The completed application form should be sent to the address specified in the official notification. It is recommended to send it via Speed Post or Registered Post to ensure timely delivery.
